prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota 4K-U (1.3L inline-4, 7K-U derived block with forged internals, 9.5:1 compression) paired with a TOM'S Racing 4K-U high-lift camshaft (272° duration, 11.0mm lift) and HKS 264° performance valve springs for 8,500 RPM redline capability

Forced induction via a custom-built Rotrex C30-94 supercharger (12 psi boost) with an integrated air-to-water intercooler (PWR Racing core) and a custom 3-inch stainless steel intake manifold (fabricated by Trust/GReddy) feeding a Toyota 7K-E throttle body

Drivetrain reinforcement with a TOM'S Racing close-ratio 5-speed transmission (P51 gearset, 2.3:1 1st gear), OS Giken twin-plate clutch (240mm disc), and a Cusco 1.5-way mechanical LSD (25-spline, 4.3:1 final drive ratio) for optimal power transfer to a reinforced Toyota K-series rear axle
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny P-Body widebody kit (PUB-001, fiberglass construction) with custom front canards (J's Racing Type-2) and a carbon fiber rear diffuser (Seibon, 3-piece design) for aggressive stance and aero balance
Custom 15x7-inch SSR MK3 wheels (ET+15, 4x100 PCD) wrapped in Yokohama Advan A052 semi-slick tires (195/50R15) with custom wheel spacers (5mm front, 10mm rear) for flush fitment and improved turn-in

Interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (Toyota Publica-specific mounting brackets), a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel (quick-release hub), and a full roll cage (Sparco Pro 2000, 6-point, bolt-in) with custom door bars for chassis rigidity and vintage JGTC aesthetics
